headline: The New Business That Flagged AppLovin Stock’s Next Move
summary: While Wall Street was still sizing up its gaming empire, AppLovin was quietly building a second, faster-growing one right on its earnings calls.

headline: Digital Turbine's Ad Platform Expands: Can the Momentum Continue?
summary: APPS' ad platform is gaining momentum as AGP revenues, brand advertising and DT Exchange grow, supported by AI and publisher scale.
